ProductConstraintModel.description: Constraint model for the Fiber Drop and Site Installation product (Track 3 fulfillment). Enforces: FIBER_INSTALL line is excluded from SLA PoT pricing calculation (see ADR-004 declarative-first Expression Set filter). Fiber_Meters__c is mandatory and must be greater than 0 at order activation. Cannot be sold without a Router on the same quote. See ADR-003, ADR-004.

constraint.description: Fiber installation requires at least one Router on the same quote — fiber is a site prerequisite, not a standalone offering.
Maximum 1 fiber installation line per site.
constraint.masterLabel: Fiber Install Max One Per Site
